title: leersia ligularis var. breviligulata
intro: Leersia ligularis var. breviligulata, also known as swamp rice grass or short-bearded sprangletop, is a type of aquatic grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which may help to soothe digestive issues and wounds. The health benefits of Leersia ligularis var. breviligulata include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Leersia ligularis var. breviligulata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
